arts.ttl: Everton vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: David Moyes takes on his former side this weekend when Everton host Manchester United in the Premier League. Everton are on the up under Moyes, following his return to the club last month. The Scot has taken 13 points from his last five games to lift Everton away from the relegation places.
